payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara matches the existing remembered person, but the new relationship conflicts with the current stored relationship.

details: Detected direct relationship conflict for Sara.

repair_options: Confirm Sara is your daughter and reject the niece relationship.
Confirm Sara is your niece and replace the daughter relationship.
Clarify that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
Clarify if Sara is both your daughter and niece due to a specific family circumstance.
